view.title: Tikit {id}
view.subject: Taken
view.emailDisabled: An kashe imel ɗinka ({email}). Da fatan za a tuntubi
view.ipHelpText: Idan haɗin gwiwa yana zuwa daga adireshi IP daban. Da fatan za a canza shi.
view.passwordEncrypted: An adana kalmomin sirri a cikin bayanan da aka keɓance daban.
view.ticketClosed: An rufe wannan tikiti, don haka an kashe amsa. Idan har kuna buƙatar taimako, buɗe tikiti sabon.
view.replyHint: Ƙirƙirar tikiti daban don sabbin matsaloli yana taimaka wa ƙungiyarmu ta yi ta fifiko da magance su da sauri.
view.userLikedReply: Mai amfani ya so amsar ka
view.userDislikedReply: Mai amfani bai so amsar ka ba

new.title: Sabon Tikit
new.subject: Taken
new.subjectValidation: Da fatan za a shigar da gajeren bayani game da matsalar.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Muna godiya da taimakonku wajen kula da tsarin tallafi ta hanyar gabatar da buƙata ɗaya a kowace tikiti.
new.descriptionValidation: Da fatan za a shigar da cikakken bayani game da matsalar.
new.fileNote: Lura: An ba da izinin fayilolin hoto kawai - gif/jpeg/png.
new.allowAccessLabel: Na ba InterServer izinin shiga uwar garken ni kuma ya yi gyare-gyare
new.accessNote: Da fatan za a lura: Ta hanyar buɗe buƙatar tallafi, InterServer na iya buƙatar samun damar shiga, gyara ko canza fayiloli a cikin asusunku. Ana buƙatar wannan don ba da tallafin fasaha. Da fatan za a ci gaba kawai idan kun yarda.
